NAVAREA XIX 125/17
BARENTS SEA
AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER
ELEMENTS FALL 13 AND 14 OCT FROM 0915 TO 1010 UTC IN AREA BOUNDED BY
A. 74-23-35N 025-39-20E 
B. 74-27-04N 027-33-58E 
C. 74-01-40N 028-39-28E 
D. 73-33-35N 027-52-28E
E. 73-30-15N 026-03-38E 
F. 73-54-53N 024-56-20E
